_comment: FocusLock configuration — copy to config.json and edit
_admin_comment: operator_mesh_id identifies YOUR mesh for the admin API. Requests to /admin/status and /admin/order without mesh_id operate on this mesh. For other vault_only meshes, the admin API returns metadata only — never plaintext orders.
_vault_comment: Zero-knowledge vault — see docs/VAULT-DESIGN.md. Server stores opaque encrypted blobs and verifies Lion signatures but cannot read order contents. Set vault_mode_allowed:false to disable the /vault/* endpoints entirely. retention_days bounds disk use; clients should sync at least this often.
_ntfy_comment: Push notifications — instant order delivery via ntfy.sh (or self-hosted). Topic auto-derived from mesh_id if empty. Payload is just a version number — zero-knowledge by construction.
